cadence_note: ENTSOG TSOs publish operational data (physical flows, nominations, allocations) per gas day, with provisional values revised for several days afterwards; flowStatus flips Provisional -> Confirmed. Reg. (EC) 715/2009 Annex I 3.3 requires daily publication. Refreshed daily; the operationaldata fetch re-pulls a 45-day trailing window each run so revisions are picked up.
